faqs.question: What causes drain fly infestations in Crown Heights homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and plumbing fixtures. In Crown Heights, older buildings with aging plumbing systems are especially susceptible. Moisture accumulation in bathroom drains, kitchen sinks, basement floor drains, and even air conditioning units creates perfect breeding grounds for these pests.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide drain fly treatment in Crown Heights?
faqs.answer: We typically offer same-day or next-day service for Crown Heights residents. Our technicians are familiar with the neighborhood and can reach properties throughout Crown Heights quickly, from the eastern border near Brownsville to the western edge near Prospect Heights.

faqs.question: What does your drain fly treatment process include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive treatment includes identifying breeding sites, thoroughly cleaning and treating all affected drains with professional-grade bio-enzymatic cleaners, applying targeted treatments to eliminate larvae and adults, and providing prevention recommendations. We also inspect for hidden moisture issues that may contribute to infestations.

faqs.question: Is the drain fly treatment safe for my Crown Heights apartment or brownstone?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely. We use eco-friendly, low-toxicity products that are safe for children, pets, and all occupants. Our methods are particularly well-suited for Crown Heights' multi-family buildings and historic properties where safety and preservation are priorities. You can return to treated areas shortly after service.
